𝗢𝗣𝗘𝗡𝗖𝗟𝗔𝗪-𝗔𝗡𝗗𝗥𝗢𝗜𝗗 | Enabling users to run OpenClaw and other Linux binaries on Android devices with minimal resource consumption and simplified setup.  🌟 Rising Fast!

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: ☕ Java 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling users to run OpenClaw and other Linux binaries on Android devices with minimal resource consumption and simplified setup.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Run OpenClaw on Android without proot-distro
✅ Minimal storage overhead (~200MB)
✅ Fast setup time (3-10 minutes)
✅ Native performance
✅ Standalone Android app with integrated UI and terminal
✅ Automatic path and environment conversion for Termux
✅ Supports Android 7.0+


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 976 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 119 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 14 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

OpenClaw on Android allows users to run OpenClaw, a powerful tool, directly on their Android devices without the need for a full Linux distribution like proot-distro. It achieves this by installing only the necessary glibc dynamic linker, significantly reducing storage overhead and setup time while offering native performance.

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗢𝗣𝗘𝗡𝗦𝗣𝗔𝗖𝗘 | To enhance existing AI agents by enabling them to learn, adapt, and evolve from experience, leading to improved performance, reduced costs, and shared intelligence across a network of agents.  🌟 Rising Fast!

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To enhance existing AI agents by enabling them to learn, adapt, and evolve from experience, leading to improved performance, reduced costs, and shared intelligence across a network of agents.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Self-Evolution (AUTO-FIX, AUTO-IMPROVE, AUTO-LEARN, Quality monitoring)
✅ Collective Agent Intelligence (Shared evolution, Network effects, Easy sharing, Access control)
✅ Token Efficiency (Reuse successful solutions, Reduced task costs, Small updates)
✅ Compatibility with various agents (OpenClaw, nanobot, Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, etc.)
✅ One-command evolution and skill sharing


♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

OpenSpace is a self-evolving engine designed to make AI agents smarter, more cost-efficient, and capable of learning from real-world experience. It enhances existing agents by providing them with self-evolutionary skills, enabling them to automatically fix, improve, and learn from usage, while also facilitating collective intelligence through skill sharing among agents.

This repository hosts two open-source applications: OSS Document Scanner, an Android app for scanning documents, and Oss CardWallet, an app for managing digital cards. Both apps leverage advanced image processing and OCR technologies.

𝗥𝗔𝗩𝗘𝗡 | Enabling users to interact with and gain insights from their documents through a local, private AI assistant on macOS and iOS.  🔥 Super Hot!

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🍎 Swift 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling users to interact with and gain insights from their documents through a local, private AI assistant on macOS and iOS.
📅 Created: Jul 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Text extraction from images, PDFs, audio, and video files
✅ Audio transcription and video text extraction
✅ Smart Q&A and contextual content analysis
✅ Local AI processing using Apple Foundation Models
✅ Project creation and file organization
✅ Privacy-focused, all data stays on device


◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Raven is a privacy-focused document chat application for macOS and iOS that allows users to upload files and ask questions, with all processing performed locally on the device using Apple Foundation Models. It extracts text from various file types, transcribes audio, and provides contextual answers and summaries without requiring internet connectivity.

Memory Guardian is a lightweight Android application designed to enhance user privacy and security by automatically clearing the clipboard at user-defined intervals. It offers manual clearing, clipboard editing, and notifications, all within a minimalistic, ad-free, and permission-free interface.

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a user-friendly, visual interface for generating and customizing configuration files for the Ghostty terminal.

✅ Interactive settings editor for fonts, colors, cursor styles, transparency, blur, etc.
✅ Font playground with support for various font types.
✅ Live previews of cursors, selections, app icons, and color palettes.
✅ One-click export of Ghostty configuration files.
✅ Automatic deployment via GitHub Actions.

Ghostty Config is a web-based tool that simplifies the customization of the Ghostty terminal. It provides an intuitive interface for users to visually adjust settings like fonts, colors, and cursor styles, with live previews, and then export a ready-to-use configuration file.
